memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_k_q8_k_avx

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K, int ith, int nth)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_k_q8_k_parallel

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K, int ith, int nth)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_k_q8_k_parallel_simd

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_k_q8_k_ref

briefdescription.para: AVX Q4_K x Q8_K matvec kernel for Sandy/Ivy Bridge.

detaileddescription.para: Uses _mm_maddubs_epi16 (SSSE3) for efficient u8*s8 multiply-add while maintaining our scale format from unpack_q4_k_scales.
Key improvement over SSE: _mm_maddubs_epi16 processes 16 pairs per instruction vs SSE's _mm_cvtepu8_epi16 + _mm_madd_epi16 (8 pairs).
